    P

    posterBase64 - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Base64-encoded JPEG string of the event poster image chosen by the organiser.
    PREFS_NAME - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.RoleCheckActivity
    Name of the
    invalid reference 
    SharedPreferences
    file shared across the application for storing session and registration state.
    PREFS_NAME - Static variable in class com.example.codebase.WelcomeActivity
    Name of the
    invalid reference 
    SharedPreferences
    file used to store app-wide session state, including the current user role and registration status.
    price - Variable in class com.example.codebase.CreateEventViewModel
    Ticket price in the organiser's local currency.
    ProfileActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Displays a summary of the current user's profile and provides navigation to profile editing and role switching.
    ProfileActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.ProfileActivity
     
    ProfileFragment - Class in com.example.codebase
    A Fragment that displays the current user's profile information and provides a shortcut to edit it.
    ProfileFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.ProfileFragment
     
    ProfileSettingsActivity - Class in com.example.codebase
    Activity for creating or updating a user's profile information.
    ProfileSettingsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.codebase.ProfileSettingsActivity
